steps.title: Extract the slope and y-intercept
steps.content: The slope is given as $m = 3$. The point $(0, -8)$ lies on the $y$-axis (where $x = 0$), so this is the $y$-intercept: $b = -8$.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$f(x) = 3x$': Has slope 3 but $y$-intercept 0, not $-8$. ✗
  • Choice B — '$f(x) = 3x - 8$': Slope 3, $y$-intercept $-8$. Passes through $(0, -8)$. ✓
  • Choice C — '$f(x) = 3x + 5$': Has slope 3 but $y$-intercept $+5$, not $-8$. ✗
  • Choice D — '$f(x) = 3x + 11$': Has slope 3 but $y$-intercept $+11$, not $-8$. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
